failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id
FROM 
    profile p,
    to_tsquery('english', 'sell & online | shop | store | website | link') AS q
WHERE 
    p.username = 'haight_clothing'
    AND p.biography_lexemes @@ q
ORDER BY 
    ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, q) DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id
FROM
  profile p
WHERE
  p.username = 'haight_clothing'
  AND (
    p.biography ILIKE '%sell%' OR
    p.biography ILIKE '%shop%' OR
    p.biography ILIKE '%store%' OR
    p.biography ILIKE '%website%' OR
    p.biography ILIKE '%link%' OR
    p.biography ILIKE '%online%'
  )
ORDER BY
  p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:

  p.id AS profile_id
FROM
  profile p
WHERE
  p.username = 'haight_clothing'

    p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'sell | shop | store | website | link | online')

ORDER BY
  p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
